free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of approx. 6 MeV
protons on Co-59 and the excited core model.
The target of Co-59 was manufactured by electrolytic
extraction of metallic cobalt. Self-supporting targets
of both the 0.6 mg/cm2 and 0.9 mg/cm2 thickness fixed
at thin organic film were used.
Sum over five lower energy levels is given.
Sum over five upper energy levels is given.
Integral cross section of 12 mb includes the cross
section corresponding to the 1.432 MeV level.
